# Vacation Scope Requirements Checklist: Phase 10 - Vacation Request Scope Hardening

**Purpose**: Validate that Phase 10 vacation request scope, ownership, review, delete, creator-tracking, and compatibility requirements are clear, complete, consistent, and ready for planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. It tests the quality of the requirements, not the implementation.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are vacation request list, detail, create, review, and delete requirements all defined for every role? [Completeness, Spec FR-003-FR-032]
- [x] CHK002 Are owner, creator, reviewer, self scope, team scope, organization scope, and on-behalf creation terms all defined before they are used in requirements? [Completeness, Spec Boundary Definitions]
- [x] CHK003 Are Phase 8 and Phase 9 dependencies documented clearly enough for the plan to know which shared scope behavior must already exist? [Dependency, Spec Existing Context Findings]
- [x] CHK004 Are all existing vacation validation rules that must be preserved identified with enough specificity to prevent accidental rule changes? [Completeness, Spec FR-016, FR-026]
- [x] CHK005 Are route and response compatibility boundaries complete for successful responses, error responses, cookies, claims, and pagination? [Completeness, Spec FR-033]
- [x] CHK006 Are migration-gated creator-tracking requirements complete enough to guide planning without authorizing a migration automatically? [Completeness, Spec FR-018-FR-021, FR-036]
- [x] CHK007 Are out-of-scope modules explicitly excluded so Phase 10 cannot expand into trips, employees, Swagger, or unrelated HR modules? [Completeness, Spec Out of Scope]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK008 Is the manager default list behavior unambiguous about excluding manager-owned vacation requests unless an explicit self filter is used? [Clarity, Spec Clarifications, FR-004, FR-006]
- [x] CHK009 Is the manager `employeeId` self-filter exception specified clearly enough to distinguish it from unfiltered team list behavior? [Clarity, Spec FR-006]
- [x] CHK010 Is `403 Forbidden` ordering for existing out-of-scope targets stated clearly enough to prevent leaking pending status, transition validity, balance, notice, or overlap details? [Clarity, Spec FR-002A]
- [x] CHK011 Is missing-target behavior distinguished clearly from existing-but-out-of-scope behavior for detail and delete operations? [Clarity, Spec FR-011, FR-012, FR-031, FR-032]
- [x] CHK012 Is self-review forbidden in a way that clearly includes Manager, HRAdministrator, and SystemAdministrator roles? [Clarity, Spec FR-024, FR-025]
- [x] CHK013 Is manager team scope defined with enough precision to include active direct and indirect reports and exclude soft-deleted or terminated reports? [Clarity, Spec Boundary Definitions, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK014 Is pending-only delete behavior specified clearly enough to preserve current delete semantics while adding role and scope restrictions? [Clarity, Spec FR-027-FR-030]
- [x] CHK015 Is creator tracking worded clearly as required after approved storage exists, without implying current schema changes are already approved? [Clarity, Spec FR-018-FR-021]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK016 Are the user stories, functional requirements, access matrix, success criteria, and assumptions consistent for manager list behavior? [Consistency, Spec User Story 2, FR-004, FR-006, Access Matrix, SC-003, SC-003A]
- [x] CHK017 Are the user stories, functional requirements, and access matrix consistent for manager detail access to self plus team requests? [Consistency, Spec User Story 2, FR-009, Access Matrix]
- [x] CHK018 Are the user stories, functional requirements, and access matrix consistent that managers may create only self vacation requests and not team requests? [Consistency, Spec User Story 2, FR-014, Access Matrix]
- [x] CHK019 Are the user stories, functional requirements, and access matrix consistent that managers may not delete team member vacation requests? [Consistency, Spec User Story 4, FR-029, Access Matrix]
- [x] CHK020 Are HRAdministrator and SystemAdministrator requirements consistent across list, detail, create, review, and delete operations? [Consistency, Spec User Story 3, FR-005, FR-010, FR-015, FR-024, FR-030]
- [x] CHK021 Are creator-tracking statements consistent between clarifications, functional requirements, key entities, success criteria, and assumptions? [Consistency, Spec Clarifications, FR-018-FR-021, Key Entities, SC-013, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK022 Are same-status vacation review requirements consistent with the Phase 5 idempotent no-op behavior referenced by the spec? [Consistency, Spec Edge Cases, FR-026]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK023 Are success criteria measurable with role-specific outcomes instead of vague statements such as "secure" or "properly scoped"? [Measurability, Spec Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK024 Do success criteria include explicit checks for manager self-filter behavior as distinct from unfiltered manager list behavior? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-003, SC-003A]
- [x] CHK025 Do success criteria include authorization-first ordering for out-of-scope targets as an objectively measurable outcome? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-014]
- [x] CHK026 Do success criteria include a measurable compatibility boundary for validation rules, response shape, cookies, and claims? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-011]
- [x] CHK027 Do success criteria define a measurable no-unrelated-phase boundary for employees, trips, compensation, documents, attendance, dashboard, audit, bootstrap, and Swagger? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-012]
- [x] CHK028 Does the migration success criterion make it objectively clear that no migration is created unless separately approved? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-013]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Are primary scenarios documented for Employee own-only list/detail/create/delete and no-review behavior? [Coverage, Spec User Story 1]
- [x] CHK030 Are primary scenarios documented for Manager team list/detail/review and self-only create/delete behavior? [Coverage, Spec User Story 2, User Story 4]
- [x] CHK031 Are primary scenarios documented for HRAdministrator and SystemAdministrator organization-wide list/detail/create/review/delete behavior? [Coverage, Spec User Story 3, User Story 4]
- [x] CHK032 Are exception scenarios documented for missing requester context, missing target request, existing out-of-scope request, and invalid target employee? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK033 Are conflict/business-rule scenarios documented for overlap, insufficient balance, notice period, transition validity, same-status behavior, and non-pending delete? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases, FR-016, FR-026, FR-027]
- [x] CHK034 Are filter and pagination scenarios documented so scope is applied before filtering or pagination can leak out-of-scope records? [Coverage, Spec FR-006, FR-007]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK035 Are suspended requester and suspended target assumptions specified clearly enough for endpoint-specific planning? [Edge Case, Spec Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK036 Are soft-deleted and terminated requester/target cases covered for self, team, organization, and target eligibility decisions? [Edge Case, Spec Edge Cases, FR-017]
- [x] CHK037 Is manager-with-no-team behavior specified clearly enough for list results and denial behavior? [Edge Case, Spec Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK038 Are historical existing vacation rows with null creator metadata addressed so query and response behavior remains safe? [Edge Case, Spec FR-020, FR-021]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK039 Are assumptions about Phase 8 scope foundation and Phase 9 employee hardening sufficient to prevent duplicate or conflicting scope logic in Phase 10? [Assumption, Spec Assumptions]
- [x] CHK040 Is the dependency on a separately approved creator-tracking migration explicit enough for task generation to include a migration-strategy task instead of a migration command? [Dependency, Spec FR-019, FR-036]
- [x] CHK041 Are compatibility assumptions documented for current route names, DTO shapes, status-code conventions, and structured error payloads? [Assumption, Spec FR-033]
- [x] CHK042 Are out-of-scope assumptions documented strongly enough to prevent accidental Phase 11, Phase 12, or Phase 13 work? [Assumption, Spec Out of Scope]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK043 Are there any remaining phrases such as "unless future approved" or "existing behavior" that need a concrete Phase 10 decision before planning? [Ambiguity, Spec User Story 4, Assumptions]
- [x] CHK044 Are there any conflicts between pending-only delete preservation and role/scope delete requirements? [Conflict, Spec FR-027-FR-030]
- [x] CHK045 Are there any conflicts between manager team-only list behavior and manager self detail/create/self-filter behavior? [Conflict, Spec FR-004, FR-006, FR-009, Access Matrix]
- [x] CHK046 Are there any conflicts between creator tracking being required and the no-migration-without-approval boundary? [Conflict, Spec FR-018-FR-021, FR-036]
